summary: The source contract always contains exactly four digit positions, so runtime scaling cannot represent increasing legal work; exhaustive pattern evidence replaces artificial tiers.

workload_bound.source_constraint: time always has the fixed five-character hh:mm format

replacement_checks.evidence: The reference makes at most four digit replacements with fixed hour and minute validity comparisons.
Regression generates every valid-completable hidden pattern from all 1,440 times and all 16 digit masks, then compares the reference with a reverse chronological oracle.
